GRuModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=6, out_features=64, bias=True)
  (encoder_linear): Linear(in_features=6, out_features=64, bias=True)
  (gru): GRU(64, 64, batch_first=True)
  (decoder_linear): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=6, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=6, out_features=6, bias=True)
)

  (linear1): Linear(in_features=6, out_features=64, bias=True)
  (encoder_linear): Linear(in_features=6, out_features=64, bias=True)
  (gru): GRU(64, 64, batch_first=True)
  (decoder_linear): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=6, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=6, out_features=6, bias=True)
